title: keeper-ksm.v1 (scaffold)
description: Scaffold-only schema for the keeper-ksm family (P13 in docs/V2_DECISIONS.md). No body yet — landing as part of P13 work. Validators MUST reject any manifest that declares this schema with a non-empty body until x-keeper-live-proof.status leaves 'scaffold-only'.

x-keeper-live-proof.notes: Top-level keys planned: ksm_apps, ksm_clients, ksm_shares. See docs/V2_DECISIONS.md Q1.
